training_status: walking one mile and exercises with 20 pound dumbbells; severe physical limitations from MVA

benefits.description: Lost from 330 lbs to 260 lbs with diet, calorie counting, and Zepbound; currently plateaued at 260 lbs for 6 months

protocol_notes: User maxed out Tirzepatide (Zepbound) dose and has been stuck at 260 lbs for 6 months. Plans to transition to retatrutide, then add a second compound (considering Cagrilintide, Mots-C, or Tesamorelin). Has concerns about significant heart rate increases. Starting weight was 330 lbs, height 6'2". Recovery from severe MVA involving tractor-trailer took 10 years.
